title: Colgate-Palmolive Webcasts Fireside Chat at the Morgan Stanley Global Consumer & Retail Conference
text: NEW YORK--( BUSINESS WIRE )--Colgate-Palmolive (NYSE:CL) Group President, Europe and Developing Markets, Panagiotis Tsourapas; Chief Financial Officer, Stan Sutula; and Chief Investor Relations Officer and SVP, M&A, John Faucher, will participate in a fireside chat at the Morgan Stanley Global Consumer & Retail Conference on Tuesday, December 6, 2022 at 1:45 p.m. ET.

title: Colgate, Twitter And Bath & Body Works Were Third Point's Largest Q3 Buys. Find Out What Else They Traded
text: This week, Daniel Leeb's New York Based Hedge Fund Third Point LLC reported its trades that occurred during the quarter.

title: 7 Stocks Billionaires are Buying Now
text: It isn't easy to figure out which stocks billionaires are buying right now. With sky-high inflation, fears of recession, weak economic growth, Russia's invasion of Ukraine, and a weaker consumer, the Dow Jones Industrial Average is down 12% on the year.
